title: HELP FOR CONSTITUENTS | Liam Byrne MP
headings: h2: LIAM'S COST OF LIVING GUIDE
h2: Since becoming your MP, Liam has been tirelessly fighting for your fair share. See below what Liam has achieved over the years of his Hodge Hill journey.
text_excerpt: --> HELP FOR CONSTITUENTS | Liam Byrne MP top of page HOME HELP FOR CONSTITUENTS RAISE A LOCAL ISSUE YOUR AREA CAMPAIGNS - HUMAN RIGHTS ABOUT More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. SURVEY HELP FOR CONSTITUENTS If you need help with any issues ranging from immigration to benefits, please do not hesitate to contact me. I receive hundreds of emails a month from constituents and my casework team and I will do everything we can to advocate for your fair share, no matter the case at hand. ​ Below are a series of links and contact details for various organisations across the constituency, or online resources, which may be able to help you or answer any questions you have. To raise an issue with me, please email liam.byrne.mp@parliament.uk including your name, address, details of your case and any further information or reference numbers that may be relevant to your case. MPs can only take on the cases of those within their constituency. Therefore, please do not contact me unless you are a constituent in Birmingham Hodge Hill. ​ ​ CLICK HERE TO CHECK WHO YOUR MP IS SURGERIES Liam holds monthly surgeries at Ward End Fire Station, Elmwood Hub, and at his office in Hodge Hill. To book an appointment email liam.byrne.mp@parliament.uk or call 0121789 7287 SCHEDULE A MEETING HELPFUL ORGANISATIONS Birmingham City Council Advice Centre, 57 Sutton New Road, B23 6QT +44 (0)121 216 3030 Visit website Citizens' Advice Ground Floor Gazette Buildings, 168 Corporation Street, B4 6TF 0344 477 1010 Visit website Welcome Change Welcome Change Community Hub, 316 Kitts Green Road, B33 9SB +44 (0)121 216 3030 Visit website The Dolphin Centre Ralph Road, Saltley, B8 1NA +44 (0)121 326 8343 The Pump 286 Kitts Green Road, Glebe Farm B33 9SB, +44 (0)121 675 8381 Visit website Visit website Screenshot_20230330-100859_Drive Screenshot_20230330-100921_Drive Screenshot_20230330-101104_Drive Screenshot_20230330-100859_Drive 1/8 LIAM'S COST OF LIVING GUIDE Since becoming your MP, Liam has been tirelessly fighting for your fair share. See below what Liam has achieved over the years of his Hodge Hill journey. LIAM'S HODGE HILL RECORD Hodge Hill is home to some wonderful community projects and we want to support all groups to keep making a difference in our community. ​ Our flagship event is our annual Hodge Hill Funders Fair where we invite major funders along to share with you the type of projects they fund and what criteria need to be met to ensure your bid is successful. Last year’s fair was held on 31st July at Saltley Wellbeing Community Centre and was attended by; Asda, Birmingham Airport, Groundwork West Midlands, National Lottery Heritage Fund, Severn Trent, Sport Birmingham, Street Games, Tesco, Veolia Environmental Trust and West Midlands Community Housing. CLICK HERE TO SEE MORE ABOUT FUNDING OUT COMMUNITY GROUPS FUNDING COMMUNITY GROUPS LIAM BYRNE MP Email: liam.byrne.mp@parliament.uk Phone: 0121 789 7287 Follow Liam on Social Media: Privacy Policy > Acceptable Behaviour Policy > © 2024, The 1900 Creative LTD .
